source_report: FC+ESC stack supply chain intelligence for the UAS/drone industry

stack_manufacturers.name: SkyStars
stack_manufacturers.market_position: Largest stack manufacturer by product count. Budget to mid-range.

stack_manufacturers.name: Diatone
stack_manufacturers.market_position: Established drone/stack manufacturer. MAMBA FC/ESC line.

stack_manufacturers.name: Flywoo
stack_manufacturers.market_position: Integrated drone kits + stacks. GOKU line.

stack_manufacturers.name: T-Motor (Tiger Motors)
stack_manufacturers.market_position: Premium motors and stacks. Used by some enterprise/defense drone builders despite Chinese origin.

stack_manufacturers.name: Holybro
stack_manufacturers.market_position: Major ArduPilot/PX4 ecosystem supplier. Pixhawk-based FCs + Tekko ESCs. Enterprise and DIY.
stack_manufacturers.strategic_note: Holybro is deeply embedded in the open-source autopilot ecosystem. Many Blue UAS builders start with Holybro hardware.

stack_manufacturers.name: SpeedyBee
stack_manufacturers.market_position: F405 V3/V4 stack is the best-selling budget stack. Bluetooth configuration app.

stack_manufacturers.name: NewBeeDrone
stack_manufacturers.ndaa_note: US company, but boards likely manufactured in China (Shenzhen CM). PCB assembly origin requires verification.
stack_manufacturers.market_position: US-based FPV brand. Hummingbird stack line. Close partnership with Grepow (Tattu) for batteries.

stack_manufacturers.name: Lumenier (GetFPV)
stack_manufacturers.ndaa_note: US company (GetFPV house brand). PCBs likely manufactured in China. Design is US.
stack_manufacturers.market_position: Premium FPV brand. QAV line frames + Alpha stacks.

stack_manufacturers.name: 603700 (Ukrainian manufacturer)
stack_manufacturers.market_position: Ukrainian combat-proven stacks. Галичина v2 and similar. 7-inch class platforms.
